entries.retune_lever: Check probe placement, interpolation, frame timing, local bathymetry, velocity masks, and water-query sampling.

entries.likely_root_cause: Free-surface slope differs enough to change hydraulic controls and raft force sampling.
notes: Max Linf across eta slope fields.
entries.retune_lever: Retune bed-slope source scaling, slope reconstruction, smoothing, and limiter behavior before feature forcing.

entries.likely_root_cause: GeoClaw and C++ disagree on wet/dry cells, usually near shorelines, shelves, banks, or shallow eddies.
notes: Max wet/dry mask mismatch fraction across compared frames.
entries.retune_lever: Tune dry tolerance, positivity preservation, shoreline velocity masking, bed roughness, and shallow-cell damping.

entries.likely_root_cause: Cross-section profiles disagree, indicating reach-scale shape, velocity, or water-surface drift.
notes: Max Linf across cross-section fields; u/v/Froude masked below 0.15 m.
entries.retune_lever: Compare section alignment, width/depth profiles, roughness mapping, and cross-section sampling windows.

entries.likely_root_cause: Energy gain/loss differs, which can move bores, jumps, drops, and hole stickiness.
notes: Absolute C++ minus reference energy-change delta.
entries.retune_lever: Retune roughness, damping, hydraulic-jump/drop dissipation, tailwater controls, and feature forcing only after conservation is stable.

entries.likely_root_cause: The strongest modeled feature appears in a different place than the GeoClaw-derived reference.
notes: Max observed feature response location delta.
entries.retune_lever: Verify bathymetry registration, reach/drop transforms, feature probes, flow band selection, and authored feature anchors.

entries.likely_root_cause: The modeled feature strength differs, affecting holes, laterals, eddies, waves, shelves, and boulder response.
notes: Max observed feature response strength delta.
entries.retune_lever: Retune roughness, damping, feature response curves, and low-default forcing after base conservation and geometry pass.
